overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character with green hair walking through a densely packed neon-lit urban street at night. The character passes various street vendors, vending machines, and NPCs before stopping to look up at a massive skyscraper with a color-changing digital billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with food vendors

agents.ego_description: character with green hair and brown jacket walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange shirt walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: illuminated white HOTEL sign on building facade
green vending machine stall with bright red BURRITO XXXL signage
large colorful digital advertisements and anime-style graphics on building walls
blue garbage bags piled against the wall on the sidewalk
yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the street surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city street at night, following a character with green hair walking along a concrete sidewalk. The environment is dense with neon signage including a prominent HOTEL sign and a BURRITO XXXL food stall, while blue trash bags and various pedestrians populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing area with vending machines

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk onto the street crossing area
black sedan drives past the character on the street

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street while passing blue vending machines, navigating around a moving vehicle

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street past the character

entered.detail: pair of blue automated vending machines with illuminated product displays
tall green painted building with balconies, air conditioning units, and red paper lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street, moving from the sidewalk onto asphalt. A pair of blue vending machines and a distinctive green building facade come into view on the left, while a black sedan drives past. The neon billboards shift to the left as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food counter with outdoor seating and neon entrance

events.description: character approaches and walks past an outdoor food counter with seated customers

agents.ego_description: character walks past a food counter where NPCs are seated on stools, then continues toward a neon-lit entrance

notable_agents.action: woman with short white hair sitting at the food counter eating
vendor in green apron serving food behind the illuminated counter

entered.detail: long metal food counter with illuminated display case and green stools where customers are seated
large cyan neon sign reading FREE CITY over a building entrance
staircase with red trim leading up to an upper level entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower section of the street, passing a food counter where NPCs sit on green stools eating. A prominent cyan FREE CITY neon sign marks an entrance on the right, while the green building facade looms closer on the left. The environment feels more enclosed with overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with towering skyscraper and massive digital displays

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the towering skyscraper and massive color-changing screen
camera pans back down to street level, returning to the previous perspective

agents.ego_description: character stops to look up at the massive skyscraper and color-changing billboard, then continues moving

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with illuminated windows and spires rising high above the street level
massive curved digital display on building facade cycling through bright colors including green, yellow, red, purple, and blue

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive skyscraper dominating the skyline, featuring a huge color-changing digital screen that cycles through vibrant hues. After observing the tower, the camera pans back down to street level, showing the plaza area and the FREE CITY entrance now behind the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk street that culminates in a towering view of the city's skyline. It begins by following a green-haired character along a concrete sidewalk crowded with pedestrians, blue trash bags, and glowing signs for a hotel and a burrito stall. As the character crosses the asphalt street, the perspective shifts past blue vending machines and a green building facade while a black sedan drives by. The scene then tightens as the camera moves through a narrower corridor of overhead structures, passing NPCs eating at a food counter and a cyan Free City neon sign. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive skyscraper with a color-changing digital screen before panning back down to the plaza and the entrance left behind.
